name: IdsEdwProvTypProvCatXrefDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_source AS ( SELECT X.PROV_TYP_PROV_CAT_XREF_SK, X.PROV_TYP_CD, X.PROV_CAT_CD, X.PROV_CAT_SK, X.PROV_TYP_CD_SK, X.WEB_SRCH_IN, X.USER_ID, X.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, T.PROV_TYP_NM, P.PROV_CAT_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_TYP_PROV_CAT_XREF X, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_CAT P, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_TYP_CD T WHERE X.PROV_CAT_SK = P.PROV_CAT_SK AND X.PROV_TYP_CD_SK = T.PROV_TYP_CD_SK AND X.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle} ) SELECT cte_source.PROV_TYP_PROV_CAT_XREF_SK AS PROV_TYP_PROV_CAT_XREF_SK, cte_source.PROV_TYP_CD AS PROV_TYP_CD, cte_source.PROV_CAT_CD AS PROV_CAT_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte_source.PROV_CAT_SK AS PROV_CAT_SK, cte_source.PROV_TYP_CD_SK AS PROV_TYP_SK, cte_source.PROV_CAT_NM AS PROV_CAT_NM, cte_source.PROV_TYP_NM AS PROV_TYP_NM, cte_source.WEB_SRCH_IN AS WEB_SRCH_IN, cte_source.USER_ID AS USER_ID, cte_source.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_source

Annotations:
JOB NAME: IdsEdwProvProvTypProvCatXrefDExtr
Read all the Data from IDS PROV_TYP_PROV_CAT_XREF,PROV_CAT,PROV_TYP_CD Table; Pull records based on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK
Write Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwProvProvTypProvCatXrefDLoad.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
